title: The Real Difference Between Your Choices for Selling Fonts Online Without PayPal — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: PayPal and Stripe block creators in dozens of countries. Here is the infrastructure that works everywhere they don't.

content.text: Are you a font designer in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, stuck without access to PayPal? If you've ever tried to sell digital products online, you know how frustrating it is to get blocked by PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad due to geographic restrictions or KYC requirements. It's time to break free from these limitations and explore a more permanent solution. In this post, we'll dive into the differences between conventional payment processors and a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect. Let's get started.
What Each Option Actually Offers

Conventional payment processors like PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad offer a range of features, including seamless payment processing, order management, and analytics. However, they also come with strict restrictions and requirements, such as KYC checks, which can lead to account holdups or outright blockages. On the other hand, a crypto-native infrastructure like Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect provides a more open and accessible solution, allowing sellers to integrate frontend wallet connections and generate multi-chain QR codes for instant payments. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can accept 300+ coins, including BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and more.
How They Handle Restricted Countries

PayPal, Stripe, and Gumroad have strict policies against sellers from certain countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan. If you're from one of these countries, you're likely accustomed to getting blocked or having your account suspended. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect is designed to be a global solution, allowing sellers from any country to accept payments without the need for a traditional payment processor account. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can sell your digital products worldwide, without worrying about being blocked or restricted.
Payment Speed, Fees, and Real Costs

Traditional payment processors often come with high fees and slow payment processing times. With PayPal, for example, you can expect to pay a 2.9% + $0.30 per transaction fee, and processing times can take up to several days. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect operates on a blockchain, ensuring faster payment processing times and lower fees. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can enjoy instant payments and save on transaction fees.
Traditional payment processors like PayPal and Stripe can block your account at any time, but Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect provides a permanent solution.
Automation and Delivery Capabilities

When it comes to automation and delivery, traditional payment processors often fall short. With PayPal, for example, you'll need to manually send delivery emails and track orders. In contrast, Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect offers automated delivery capabilities, allowing you to send PDF receipts and track orders instantly. With Web3 Wallet Connect, you can focus on selling your digital products, without worrying about the logistics of delivery.
Which One to Choose Based on Your Situation

If you're struggling to sell digital products online due to PayPal, Stripe, or Gumroad restrictions, it's time to consider a more permanent solution. With Unchained Commerce's Web3 Wallet Connect, you can break free from these limitations and start selling your digital products instantly. Whether you're a font designer in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan, or simply looking for a more flexible payment solution, Web3 Wallet Connect is the perfect choice.

Can I use Stripe if I am in Nigeria, Ghana, or Pakistan? Unfortunately, no. Stripe has strict policies against sellers from certain countries, including Nigeria, Ghana, and Pakistan.
